title: Narrative Profile — Unit Observables Context
description: Profile overlay schema constraining unit.observables.context for the narrative profile. Fields reference governed enums from enums.schema.json.

focalizer.description: Entity ref of the perceiving character. REQUIRED for unit_type 'scene'.

pov.description: Point of view type. REQUIRED for unit_type 'scene'.

setting.description: Entity ref of the location. SHOULD resolve to entity_type 'location'.

season.description: Season in which the unit occurs.

analepsis_type.description: Type of analepsis (flashback), if order involves analepsis.

prolepsis_type.description: Type of prolepsis (flash-forward), if order involves prolepsis.

analepsis_reach.description: How far back the analepsis reaches (e.g. '10 years', 'childhood').

analepsis_extent.description: Duration the analepsis covers in story time.

iterative_pattern.description: Type of iterative telling pattern, if frequency is iterative.

story_duration.description: Duration of story time covered by this unit.

continuity.description: Inter-unit continuity: how this unit connects to the previous one.

time_elapsed.description: Time elapsed since the previous unit (e.g. 'moments later', '3 days').

location_change.description: Whether and how the location changed from the previous unit.

temporal_gap_type.description: Nature of any temporal gap from the previous unit.

character_positions.description: Which characters are present, arriving, or departing in this unit.

present.description: Entity refs of characters present throughout the unit.

arrives.description: Characters who arrive during the unit.

departs.description: Characters who depart during the unit.

social_circle.description: Social dynamics of the scene space.

dominant.description: Which social world dominates the scene.

intersection.description: How social circles interact or collide.

territory.description: Whose home territory the scene occurs in.
